label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So there's this square dance with Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. The initial pairings are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Then there are several partner switches. I need to track each switch step by step to figure out who Claire ends up with at the end. First, the problem says that the switches happen in this order: 1. Claire and Bob switch partners. 2. Claire and Alice switch partners. 3. Bob and Claire switch partners. 4. Eve and Bob switch partners. 5. Dave and Claire switch partners. Let me track each step carefully. Maybe I can make a table or list to keep track of each person's partner after each switch. Starting with the initial pairings: 1. Alice - Lola 2. Bob - Izzi 3. Claire - Sam 4. Dave - Patrick 5. Eve - Karl First switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. So Claire (originally with Sam) will now have Bob's partner, which is Izzi. And Bob will now have Claire's original partner, which is Sam. After first switch: 1. Alice - Lola 2. Bob - Sam 3. Claire - Izzi 4. Dave - Patrick 5. Eve - Karl Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. So Claire (now with Izzi)
